title: PPIP - Login from settings - Share Data toggle disappears
scenario: After logging in with Poly credentials from the Account screen, the Share Data toggle disappears as expected.
steps: Start app for first time, go through onboarding, tap Continue as Guest.
Tap Don't Share or Share button.
Go to App Settings > General > Account. The Share Data toggle should be present with setting ON/OFF based on choice, along with description text.
Tap Log in and log in with Poly credentials.
expected: Share Data toggle should no longer be present.
